slides.headline: Fix Certification Errors
slides.body: Learn recovery strategies for when things go wrong.

slides.headline: Identify the Error
slides.body: Understand common mistakes in VASCO certification processes.

slides.headline: Apply Recovery Protocols
slides.body: Follow SAA letters and VA guidance to correct errors.
bullets: Refer to the relevant SAA letter

slides.headline: Correct the Error
slides.body: Submit a corrected COE form to avoid future issues.

slides.headline: Prevent Future Errors
slides.body: Implement strategies to prevent similar errors in the future.

slides.headline: Communicate Effectively
slides.body: Enhance communication with students and SAA regarding errors and corrections.
Learn more about recovery strategies and prevention techniques. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Identify, correct, and prevent certification errors with our comprehensive guide. Discover recovery strategies and communication protocols. Learn more now.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the last one, which could benefit from a more concise call to action.
